ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "abbreviated_title" TEXT /* Abbreviated title of the journal */,
  "full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the journal is published */,
  "scie_indexed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the journal is indexed in SCIE */,
  "ssci_indexed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the journal is indexed in SSCI */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) for the journal */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of publication (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation index (e.g., SCIE, SSCI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the citation index */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of publication (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_countries" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the journal is published */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the country in the journal's publication (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_indexes" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation index */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal was added to the citation index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id", "index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation metric */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the journal in a given year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the citation count was recorded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document cited (e.g., article, review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_factors" (
  "impact_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor metric */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor value for the journal in a given year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the impact factor was recorded */,
  "quartile" TEXT /* Quartile ranking of the journal's impact factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, librarian) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the database was accessed */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking value for the journal based on a given metric */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric used for ranking (e.g., impact factor, citation count) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was determined */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the journal (e.g., science, social science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_rankings_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for generating the recommendation (e.g., collaborative filtering, content-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being collaborated on */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., author, editor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_category_links" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id", "category_id")
)
